sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Charge Shot
special_mechanics.description: Mega Buster's charge feature from MM4 upgraded to allow charged shots to encompass wider area. Charge is lost if hit before firing.

special_mechanics.name: Beat (Robotic Bird Weapon)
special_mechanics.description: Collectible companion weapon obtained by finding 8 letters throughout the game. Can be used as a weapon asset.

special_mechanics.name: Master Weapons
special_mechanics.description: Special weapons copied from defeated Robot Masters. Require weapon energy to use and must be replenished.

special_mechanics.name: Rush Assistance
special_mechanics.description: Mega Man's faithful dog Rush can be called after completing certain stages to reach higher platforms or cross large gaps.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Available sources contain game documentation, debug information, and gameplay descriptions but no quantified physics parameters. NES title with standard platformer mechanics similar to MM1-4. No exact movement values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel precision data documented in public sources.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Debug Mode, Gameplay mechanics)
